title: Tugendhat, Tom -  Minister of State for Security, the Home Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Tugendhat left his role at the Home Office in July 2024.  Script Writer and Presenter, Self-employed Mr Tugendhat sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role as a Script writer and Presenter in a self employed capacity. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Member of the Advisory Board, SulNOx Group PLC Mr Tugendhat sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with SulNOx Group PLC. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was taken up in July 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non-Statutory Board Member, United Against Nuclear Iran Mr Tugendhat sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an unpaid appointment with United Against Nuclear Iran. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Speaker, Spoken Ltd Mr Tugendhat sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Spoken Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025 and the appointment was taken up in April 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Chair of the Senior Advisory Board, Dossity LLC Mr Tugendhat sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Dossity LLC.  The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Distinguished Fellow, Hudson Institute Mr Tugendhat sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an unpaid role with the Hudson Institute. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025 and the appointment was taken up in February 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
